pi_items.source: Task description in task.json lines 4-5; 'Pediatrics Ward' is a realistic and valid hospital location name corresponding to the pediatrics medical specialty
Task description in task.json lines 4-5; verified as appropriate description for pediatric ward in hospital administration context

Bahmni Wiki documentation (https://bahmni.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/BAH/pages/77758507/Visit+Location) confirms 'Visit Location' is a standard OpenMRS/Bahmni location tag used to designate locations that can be assigned to patient visits

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a hospital location named 'Pediatrics Ward' with the description 'Ward for pediatric inpatient care' and tags it as a 'Visit Location' in a local Bahmni/OpenMRS system. All three metadata values are verified: 'Pediatrics Ward' is a realistic hospital location name for the pediatrics department, 'Ward for pediatric inpatient care' is an appropriate description, and 'Visit Location' is a documented standard OpenMRS tag for locations usable in patient visits.
